display_text: Slark Aghanim's Scepter: Pounce gains charges and increased range. This upgrade enhances Slark's mobility and chase potential, allowing him to repeatedly engage or disengage from fights, countering kiting and positioning-based defenses.
search_text: Slark Aghanim Scepter Pounce charges range mobility chase engage disengage kiting positioning

display_text: Slark Aghanim's Shard: Depth Shroud creates a cloud that hides allies and grants them Shadow Dance effects. This upgrade counters vision-based strategies and AoE damage, enabling team-wide stealth and survivability in fights.
search_text: Slark Aghanim Shard Depth Shroud cloud hide allies Shadow Dance vision AoE damage stealth survivability
